title: Weekly Pipeline Review
summary: A weekly cadence for reviewing your sales pipeline, identifying stuck deals, and planning outreach for the coming week.

steps.title: Review pipeline by stage
steps.description: Open your CRM. For each stage (Lead → Qualified → Proposal → Negotiation → Closed), count deals and total value. Compare to last week.

steps.title: Identify stuck deals
steps.description: Flag any deal that has not moved stages in 2+ weeks. For each: what is blocking it? What is the next action? If no action exists, it is not a real deal — move it to lost or archive.

steps.title: Plan the week's outreach
steps.description: Choose 3-5 priority deals to advance this week. For each, define the specific action: send proposal, schedule demo, follow up on contract, etc. Also plan new outreach: how many new prospects will you contact?

steps.title: Update the forecast
steps.description: Based on your pipeline review, update your revenue forecast for the month and quarter. Be honest — count only deals with real next steps and engaged prospects.

kpis.target: No deal stuck in one stage for more than 2 weeks

whenToImplement: As soon as you have more than 5 active deals. Before that, a simple spreadsheet check is fine.
delegationNotes: Once you hire a sales rep, they should run this review with you weekly. Eventually they run it independently and you attend monthly.
automationNotes: Set up CRM dashboards that show pipeline by stage, deal age, and forecast automatically. Automate follow-up reminders for deals going stale.
